de.uka.ilkd.key.control

Class KeYEnvironment<U extends UserInterfaceControl>

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.control.KeYEnvironment<U>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    SymbolicExecutionEnvironment

    public class KeYEnvironment<U extends UserInterfaceControl>
extends Object
    Instances of this class are used to collect and access all relevant information for verification with KeY.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private boolean disposed
      Indicates that this KeYEnvironment is disposed.
      private InitConfig initConfig
      The loaded project.
      private Proof loadedProof
      An optional Proof which was loaded by the specified proof file.
      private AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult replayResult
      The AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult if available.
      private U ui
      The UserInterfaceControl in which the Proof is loaded.

      Loads the given location and returns all required references as KeYEnvironment.

      Loads the given location and returns all required references as KeYEnvironment.

        Returns the loaded Proof if a proof file was loaded.

      • getReplayResult

        public AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult getReplayResult()
        Returns the AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult if available.
        Returns:
        The AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult or null if not available.

      • createProof

        public Proof createProof(ProofOblInput input)
                  throws ProofInputException
        Creates a new Proof with help of the UserInterfaceControl.
        Parameters:
        input - The ProofOblInput to instantiate Proof from.
        Returns:
        The instantiated Proof.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • load

        public static KeYEnvironment<DefaultUserInterfaceControl> load(File location,
                                                               List<File> classPaths,
                                                               File bootClassPath,
                                                               List<File> includes)
                                                        throws ProblemLoaderException
        Loads the given location and returns all required references as KeYEnvironment. The MainWindow is not involved in the whole process.
        Parameters:
        location - The location to load.
        classPaths - The class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        Returns:
        The KeYEnvironment which contains all references to the loaded location.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception

      • load

        public static KeYEnvironment<DefaultUserInterfaceControl> load(File location,
                                                               List<File> classPaths,
                                                               File bootClassPath,
                                                               List<File> includes,
                                                               RuleCompletionHandler ruleCompletionHandler)
                                                        throws ProblemLoaderException
        Loads the given location and returns all required references as KeYEnvironment. The MainWindow is not involved in the whole process.
        Parameters:
        location - The location to load.
        classPaths - The class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        ruleCompletionHandler - An optional RuleCompletionHandler.
        Returns:
        The KeYEnvironment which contains all references to the loaded location.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception

      • load

        public static KeYEnvironment<DefaultUserInterfaceControl> load(Profile profile,
                                                               File location,
                                                               List<File> classPaths,
                                                               File bootClassPath,
                                                               List<File> includes,
                                                               boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs)
                                                        throws ProblemLoaderException
        Loads the given location and returns all required references as KeYEnvironment. The MainWindow is not involved in the whole process.
        Parameters:
        profile - The Profile to use.
        location - The location to load.
        classPaths - The class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true #profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
        Returns:
        The KeYEnvironment which contains all references to the loaded location.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception

      • load

        public static KeYEnvironment<DefaultUserInterfaceControl> load(Profile profile,
                                                               File location,
                                                               List<File> classPaths,
                                                               File bootClassPath,
                                                               List<File> includes,
                                                               Properties poPropertiesToForce,
                                                               RuleCompletionHandler ruleCompletionHandler,
                                                               boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs)
                                                        throws ProblemLoaderException
        Loads the given location and returns all required references as KeYEnvironment. The MainWindow is not involved in the whole process.
        Parameters:
        profile - The Profile to use.
        location - The location to load.
        classPaths - The class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        poPropertiesToForce - Some optional PO Properties to force.
        ruleCompletionHandler - An optional RuleCompletionHandler.
        forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true #profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
        Returns:
        The KeYEnvironment which contains all references to the loaded location.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception

      • load

        public static KeYEnvironment<DefaultUserInterfaceControl> load(File keyFile)
                                                        throws ProblemLoaderException
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException

      • dispose

        public void dispose()
        Disposes this KeYEnvironment.

      • isDisposed

        public boolean isDisposed()
        Checks if this KeYEnvironment is disposed meaning that dispose() was already executed at least once.
        Returns:
        true disposed, false not disposed and still functionable.
